name: password-validation-service
description: API REST para validação de senha com observabilidade (logs JSON, requestId)

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 src/app.test.ts src/http.integration.test.ts src/platform/http/json-body.test.ts src/platform/http/http-server.test.ts src/platform/logging/logger.test.ts src/modules/password-validation/domain/password-validator.test.ts src/modules/password-validation/application/validate-password.use-case.test.ts src/modules/password-validation/infrastructure/deterministic-password-assistant.test.ts src/modules/password-validation/interfaces/http/validate-password-body.schema.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage: node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 --experimental-test-coverage src/app.test.ts src/http.integration.test.ts src/platform/http/json-body.test.ts src/platform/http/http-server.test.ts src/platform/logging/logger.test.ts src/modules/password-validation/domain/password-validator.test.ts src/modules/password-validation/application/validate-password.use-case.test.ts src/modules/password-validation/infrastructure/deterministic-password-assistant.test.ts src/modules/password-validation/interfaces/http/validate-password-body.schema.test.ts
